ticket.subject: Cannot reset password
ticket.description: I clicked forgot password but the reset email never arrived. Cant access my account.

ticket.subject: Refund request
ticket.description: Please refund my last invoice as the payment was charged twice. This is important.

ticket.subject: Add dark mode
ticket.description: Would love a dark mode feature - minor cosmetic improvement suggestion.

ticket.subject: Bug report
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce: open app, tap settings. Defect: app crashes immediately, regression.

ticket.subject: Data export
ticket.description: How can I export my data to a CSV file? Looking for a one-click export.
